message:
refactor(test): simplify contention E2E to use task spawn instead of obligations

Replace obligation reserve/commit paths with simpler task spawn operations
in contention_e2e.rs to reduce API surface dependencies:

- Rename contention_obligation_lifecycle → contention_task_spawn_lifecycle
- Use create_task() instead of reserve_obligation()/commit_obligation()
- Rename contention_region_lifecycle to only create regions without cancel
- Use create_child_region(root, Budget::INFINITE) without cancel parameters
- Fix invalid hex literal 0xC0NTEND → 0xC0A7_E2D0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
